name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 23 Aug 2022
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we are happy to announce the launch of the redesigned "},{"text":"Account & Billing page","bold":true},{"text":" and the "},{"text":"Settings page","bold":true},{"text":". This release also marks the launch of the much-awaited "},{"text":"Abandoned Cart Email","bold":true},{"text":" feature for our Commerce Cloud customers. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"NEW FEATURE – Sending Abandoned Cart Emails","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"(Available for Neto by Maropost Customers Only)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Abandoned Cart email is a great way to re-engage a user and potentially recover a lost sale. Maropost not only enables you to send abandoned cart emails to your contacts but also enables you to automate the complete process."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Creating an automated process for sending abandoned cart emails will require you to complete the following steps:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Create integration between Marketing Cloud and Neto. Skip this step if the integration already exists."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Create the email content and include the abandoned cart tags within the content."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Create the Journey with the logic flow designed as follows: Abandoned Cart Trigger > Send Email Action > End"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/721-sending-abandoned-cart-emails-to-your-neto-shopify-or-clickbank-contacts?utm_source=community-search&utm_medium=organic-search&utm_term=abandoned+cart","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Sending Abandoned Cart Emails to Neto Contacts","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT – Redesigned Accounts UI and Settings UI","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The redesigned Account & Billing page and Settings page are live now! Apart from the enhanced look-and-feel, some of the other notable changes are:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Separation of account management and setup tasks"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Clear and well-organized sections"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Billing plan and usage Information"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Contact information to reach out to our specialized teams"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Account Details page has been renamed to Account & Billing and now contains the following tabs: OVERVIEW, COMPANY INFORMATION, PROFILE, USERS."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about what you can do on the Account & Billing page, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Account-Management-Overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Account Management: Overview","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OVERVIEWTab.0685g000008zaZcAAI.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OVERVIEWTab.0685g000008zaZcAAI.png","name":"OVERVIEW Tab","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2288,"width":2632}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The setup tasks that were formerly available in the accounts section have now moved to the Settings page. You can now find all your application-related setups in a single place."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about each of these setups, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Application-Settings-Overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Application Settings: Overview","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SettingsPage.0685g000008zaZNAAY.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SettingsPage.0685g000008zaZNAAY.png","name":"Settings Page","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2000,"width":2568}}]}]
